title: buildah push should have a --sign-by
body: podman push and skopeo copy can do this.  But it would make sense that after I build a container image, that I could then push the image and sign it using buildah.

comments.body: This is something customers are asking for.
Buildah push has --sign-by, implemented by commit https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/a925f79cc32c28643cdde607cd38be06e5a11645
